name: "🐛 Website Bug Report"

title: "[Bug] <short description of the issue>"
labels: ["bug", "website"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence description of what is broken. -->
<!-- Example: "The hero section CTA button overflows on mobile viewports." -->


## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to `https://skillsmith.app/...`
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behaviour

<!-- What should happen? -->

## Actual Behaviour

<!-- What actually happens? Include any error messages or console output if relevant. -->

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- Drag and drop images or a GIF here. Screenshots are extremely helpful for visual bugs. -->

## Environment

| Field            | Value                              |
|------------------|------------------------------------|
| Browser          | <!-- e.g. Chrome 123, Safari 17 --> |
| OS               | <!-- e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11 --> |
| Device           | <!-- e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24 --> |
| Viewport / zoom  | <!-- e.g. 1440×900, 375×812, 150% zoom --> |

## Severity

<!-- Pick one and delete the others -->
- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** – page is unusable / broken for most users
- [ ] 🟠 **High** – significant visual or functional regression
- [ ] 🟡 **Medium** – noticeable glitch but workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 **Low** – minor cosmetic issue

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else that might help: related issues, links, thoughts on root cause. -->
